name: logosdb-workspace
description: Private monorepo workspace (MCP: mcp/, native addon: nodejs/, n8n node: n8n/). Publish `logosdb` from nodejs/ and `logosdb-mcp-server` from mcp/; use root `npm install` so n8n resolves `logosdb` from the workspace.

scripts.npm:verify: npm run vendor-core -w logosdb && npm run build -w logosdb && npm test -w logosdb && npm test -w logosdb-mcp-server
scripts.npm:pack: npm pack -w logosdb --pack-destination /tmp && npm pack -w logosdb-mcp-server --pack-destination /tmp
